installedHint: Open Aipify from your home screen, dock, or taskbar.
modalDescription: Add Aipify to your device for quick access from your home screen or taskbar. You use the same secure sign-in, organization, and permissions as app.aipify.ai.
benefit1: Open Aipify in one tap from your home screen or dock.
benefit2: Use the same secure workspace, roles, and approvals you already trust.
benefit3: Work in a dedicated app window without browser tab clutter.
benefit4: Supported on desktop and mobile browsers where installation is available.
benefit5: Receive improvements when Aipify releases updates — no separate product to manage.
browserConfirmation: Your browser will display the final installation confirmation.

installPage.metaDescription: Install Aipify on desktop and mobile for quick access with the same secure workspace, login, and permissions.
installPage.heroSubtitle: Open Aipify like an app — with the same login, organization, and permissions you already use.
installPage.whatIsTitle: What is the Aipify Web App?
installPage.whatIsBody: The Aipify Web App installs Aipify to your home screen, dock, or taskbar. It is not a separate product, browser extension, or second portal. You continue using app.aipify.ai with your existing account.
installPage.securityBody: Installation does not bypass Aipify sign-in, two-factor authentication, or organization permissions. Sensitive actions still require human approval under your existing policies.
installPage.offlineBody: Limited cached content may be available briefly, but Aipify is designed for connected operational work. Do not expect full offline operation.
installPage.updatesBody: When you open the installed app, Aipify loads the latest release from our servers. Updates are not guaranteed to appear instantly on your device until the app is opened again.
installPage.removeBody: You can remove the installed app from your browser or device settings at any time and reinstall later from Aipify or your browser menu.
installPage.faqIntro: Common questions about installing and using the Aipify Web App.
installPage.viewAllFaqs: View all FAQs in Knowledge Center
installPage.finalCtaBody: Use Install Aipify where supported, or follow the platform instructions below.

steps.1: Sign in to Aipify in Chrome or Edge.
steps.2: Select Install Aipify from the menu or install page.
steps.3: Review the Aipify panel, then confirm in your browser dialog.

steps.1: Open app.aipify.ai in Chrome on Android.
steps.2: Tap Install Aipify or Add to Home screen when offered.
steps.3: Confirm in your browser, then open Aipify from your home screen.

steps.2: Share → Add to Home Screen (iOS/iPadOS) or File → Add to Dock (macOS Sonoma+ where available).
steps.3: Launch Aipify from the icon — sign in with your existing account.

preferences.sectionHint: Install Aipify on this device for quick access with your existing workspace.

installCard.availableHint: Add Aipify to your home screen or taskbar for quick access with your existing workspace.
installCard.alreadyInstalledTitle: Aipify is installed on this device
installCard.alreadyInstalledHint: Open Aipify from your home screen, dock, or taskbar.
installCard.unsupportedTitle: Installation is not available in this browser
installCard.unsupportedHint: Open app.aipify.ai in Chrome, Edge, or Safari to install the Aipify Web App.
installCard.dismissedHint: You can install Aipify later from this page when you are ready.

modalGuidance.manualDescription: Safari does not show a one-click install button. Follow these steps to add Aipify to your home screen or dock.
modalGuidance.manualStep1: Open app.aipify.ai in Safari on this device.
modalGuidance.manualStep2: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen (iOS/iPadOS) or use File → Add to Dock on macOS where available.
modalGuidance.manualStep3: Launch Aipify from the new icon and sign in with your existing account.
modalGuidance.unsupportedTitle: This browser cannot install the Aipify Web App
modalGuidance.unsupportedDescription: Your current browser does not support installing Aipify as an app on this device.
modalGuidance.unsupportedHint: Open app.aipify.ai in Chrome, Edge, or Safari to install. Your account, organization, and permissions stay the same.

gettingStarted.resourceDescription: Quick access from your home screen or taskbar with the same secure login.
